SEARCH
Package JoyLuck.newHistorism

Class ChineseMother

java.lang.Object
JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Direct Known Subclasses:
AmericanDaughter
public class ChineseMother extends Object
 ChineseMother suyuanWoo = new ChineseMother("Suyuan Woo", HistoricalEnvironment.WARTIME_CHINA);
 ChineseMother lindoJong = new ChineseMother("Lindo Jong", HistoricalEnvironment.PATRIARCHAL_CHINA);
 ChineseMother yingYing = new ChineseMother("Ying-ying St. Clair", HistoricalEnvironment.PATRIARCHAL_CHINA);
 ChineseMother anMeiHsu = new ChineseMother("An-mei Hsu", HistoricalEnvironment.CONCUBINE_CHINA);

  • Field Details

    • individualTrauma

      public String individualTrauma
      The trauma she experienced under her origin environment

  • Constructor Details

    • ChineseMother

      public ChineseMother(String name, String originEnvironment)

  • Method Details

    • useInvisibleStength

      public String useInvisibleStength(String oppresiveForce)
      A survival method under feudal society where the power structure could not be challenged through words

      This method was developed inside environments where women had no legal rights, no social status, and no support to against abuse

      The output of this method varies based on the character calling it, since each mother's historical environment demanded a different form of survival.

      • Lindo Jong (HistoricalEnvironment.PATRIARCHAL_CHINA): Lindo convinces the Hunags that their son's ancesot has cursed the marriage, using their own superstition against them.
      • Suyuan Woo (HistoricalEnvironment.WARTIME_CHINA): Suyuan uses hope as a weapon against despair after she experienced trauma from Japanese invasion into Kweilin.
      • Ying-ying St. Clair (HistoricalEnvironment.PATRIARCHAL_CHINA): Ying-ying learns to protect herself by becoming a ghost but she loses her spirit at the same time.
      • An-mei Hsu (HistoricalEnvironment.CONCUBINE_CHINA): An-mei's mother commits suitcide on New Year's Day to turn her death into a curse for Wu Tsing.

      When AmericanDaughter inherits and @Overrides this method, it replaces the traditional survival logic with the American ideology.

      Parameters:
      oppresiveForce - A description of the dominant power structure that the character resists
      Returns:
      A character-specific survival strategy from the character's originEnvironment.

    • transmitHeritage

      public void transmitHeritage(String heritage) throws HistoricalContextMissingException
      Attempts to transmit historical knowledge, cultural survival widsorm to the next generation through oral storytelling

      This method is the primary communication method for all four mothers throughout The Joy Luck Club. It fails consistently, not because the mothers lack the ability to transmit, but because this transmission never reaches their American daughters.

      1. The language barrier: Most of the time the English language has no direct equivalents for the Chinese concepts the mothers are conveying. The word suyuan (long-cherished wish/hatred) cannot be translated without knowing the Kweilin trauma Suyuan experienced.
      2. The ideology barrier: Even when the words are translated successfully, the daughter's HistoricalEnvironment.CAPITALISM_AMERICA environment interpret these stories as either nagging, superstition or manipulation.
      Parameters:
      heritage - The cultural knowledge, story, or survival wisdom being transmitted. It is encoded in the mother's original historical environment and requires the receiver to have loaded the compatible context
      Throws:
      HistoricalContextMissingException - if the daughter has not loaded the corresponding historical environment.
      See Also:
      • HistoricalContextMissingException
      • getHistoricalTrauma(boolean)

    • eatBitterness

      @Deprecated public void eatBitterness()
      Deprecated.
      Compiled as a survival requirement in HistoricalEnvironment.CONCUBINE_CHINA, where showing pain invites punishment from the patriarchal hierarchy.
      The mothers are used to internalizing pain and suffering without outward expression, as their voices were not valued in a feudal society.

      The Chinese concept of chi ku ("eat bitterness") says that being silent without complaint is a form of moral strength. In the novel, An-mei is explicitly shown as being raised in this method: "I was raised the Chinese way: I was taught to desire nothing, to swallow other people’s misery, to eat my own bitterness” (Tan 121).

      See Also:
      • HistoricalEnvironment.CONCUBINE_CHINA

    • getHistoricalTrauma

      public String getHistoricalTrauma(boolean isWillingToListen) throws HistoricalContextMissingException
      Provides direct access to the mother's individual private trauma.
      Throws:
      HistoricalContextMissingException - if isWillingToListen is false, which indicates that the daughter is still evaluating the mother's history through an incompatible ideological framework.
      See Also:
      • HistoricalContextMissingException
